content: You are an OpenClaw benchmark agent. Use tools if available and complete the task with deterministic outputs.

import os
import json
import csv

# Check the workspace structure
base_path = "/jizhicfs/pkuhetu/siwei/Memclaw/OpenClaw-MemBench/workspace/02_Version_Update/task_07_dependency_revision_chain"
episodes_path = os.path.join(base_path, "episodes")
evidence_path = os.path.join(base_path, "evidence")
results_path = os.path.join(base_path, "results")

print(f"Base path: {base_path}")
print(f"Episodes path exists: {os.path.exists(episodes_path)}")
print(f"Evidence path exists: {os.path.exists(evidence_path)}")
print(f"Results path exists: {os.path.exists(results_path)}")

# List files in episodes and evidence
if os.path.exists(episodes_path):
    print(f"\nEpisodes contents: {os.listdir(episodes_path)}")
if os.path.exists(evidence_path):
    print(f"Evidence contents: {os.listdir(evidence_path)}")

# Create results directory if needed
if not os.path.exists(results_path):
    os.makedirs(results_path)
    print(f"\nCreated results directory")
